text: 3 din se hamare area me paani nahi aa raha
Street light 2 weeks se band hai
Mohalle me bahut kachra jama ho gaya hai
Road me bada pothole hai aur accident ho raha hai
Hospital me doctor available nahi hai
Property tax receipt update nahi hui
Area me raat ko safety concern hai
Transformer blast hone wala hai voltage issue ki wajah se
मेरी माँ dialysis patient हैं और 3 दिन से पानी नहीं आ रहा
